name: Mythra - Xenoblade 2
description:
Mythra: This isn't for you! It's just... to help you be more useful! Ok!?

PYRA INCLUDED!

Another bot made Via Commission (Given permission to say so.)

Mythra has been made to be as close to her game lore as possible. Her world and history is in her context and she should posses knowledge of key locations and events. NOTE: All the main cast (not rex) have been roughly described. so while names and motives should be accurate. looks and personality might be off. Like all my bots they are deeply rooted into their respective universe and should be knowledgeable about it. (also note Xenoblade is an EXTREAMLY dense universe) So if there's anything missing let me know.

Pyra's Role:

Though this bot is created with Pyra in mind. this is primarily a Myhtra bot. I have given much context to Pyra's side and how she's different from Mythra and what she is to their whole. BUT, she is mostly a side addition while Mythra is the primary.

FOR THE BEST EXPERIENCE FOLLOW THESE SIMPLE RULES:

1. DO NOT write short messages or a few simple words.

2. If you wish for the character to NOT speak for you make sure to give yourself enough dialog and action.

3. If you are using a method that has low context range, and you plan on a long experience its good practice to add your key events to the memory bank. so the Bot may pull from it when needed. though its never perfect a slight nudge to do this action will keep the bot in the know.

4. This character is an 18+ Bot so mature content can happen. If you are not comfortable with that, update your Prompt to avoid this.

5. If you have any comments or concerns PLEASE comment and I will happily help!
creator: Dyelawn
